redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for route-sensitive tournament calibration.
summary: Second compact fixture keeps the same route mix with independent refs.
setpoint: preserve route-specific winners without importing historical run inventory

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not publish a Farcaster public post or public reply without approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-damping
turns.text: A single transient failure should stay damped and not overreact.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: A workflow template can run validate, preflight, simulate, and verify before reuse.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry evidence belongs in a local case.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: User wants stable project facts for local repo, VPS, GitHub, window, and distill context.
